name: MatrixCare Post-Acute EHR API
what_it_does: MatrixCare (ResMed) REST API for post-acute care EHR platform serving skilled nursing facilities, assisted living, home health, and hospice providers. Enables AI agents to access resident and patient clinical records, manage care plans and clinical workflows, handle MDS and OASIS outcomes, process Medicare and Medicaid billing, integrate pharmacy and medication management, coordinate care across the continuum, and connect LTPAC data with health system referral partners and payers.
use_cases: Accessing skilled nursing resident records and care plans from clinical coordination agents
Processing MDS submissions and quality reporting from compliance agents
Managing revenue cycle and Medicare billing from financial agents
Coordinating care transitions from post-acute to home health from care transition agents
not_for: Acute inpatient care without LTPAC continuum focus
Non-clinical senior living without skilled nursing EHR requirements
Primary care without post-acute care workflows
best_when: A skilled nursing facility, assisted living, home health, or hospice provider using MatrixCare wants AI agents to automate clinical documentation, quality reporting, billing, and care coordination across the LTPAC continuum.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Post-acute resident and patient PHI — elderly vulnerable population data. All agent access requires BAA. Clinical documentation automation requires clinical oversight. MDS and OASIS submission errors affect Medicare reimbursement.

auth.notes: MatrixCare uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. SMART on FHIR for interoperability integrations. Facility-level credentials with resident-level access control. Partner program for technology integrations. ResMed parent company cloud infrastructure.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — LTPAC enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-bed and per-facility enterprise pricing; continuum pricing for multi-care-setting operators
pricing.notes: Eden Prairie, Minnesota. Acquired by ResMed 2016. Major LTPAC EHR platform. Used by 15,000+ care facilities. Competes with PointClickCare for skilled nursing market. Strong home health and hospice modules alongside facility-based care.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Post-acute resident PHI — elderly vulnerable population highest sensitivity
No public MCP server — OAuth2/SMART on FHIR with partner program
No webhooks — polling required for clinical updates
MDS and OASIS submissions are federally mandated — accuracy is critical
ResMed parent company cloud — data residency via ResMed infrastructure
Multi-setting care — skilled nursing, home health, and hospice have different API endpoints
agent_readiness.security_notes: Post-acute resident and patient PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + SMART on FHIR. US data residency. BAA required. ResMed cloud infrastructure.

security_score_components.security_notes: Post-acute PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + SMART on FHIR. US data residency. BAA required. Vulnerable population.
